finding: The timeout/progress guard now prevents opaque child hangs, but the full `npm run validate:git-hooks-enforcement` suite still took about 202 seconds in the prior closeout, exceeding common interactive command windows and making a completed run look like a timeout risk.
expectedBehavior: Split the full hook-enforcement suite into bounded focused lanes with resumable status and retain an explicit full-suite command; report expected duration before execution so agents can choose the correct lane.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-AAO-0164 recorded a successful 202-second run with 168 steps. The current backlog cleanup keeps this as a follow-up rather than treating the slow successful run as fixed timeout behavior.
followUp: Add a performance budget/regression for focused hook lanes and a preflight estimate for the full suite; preserve child timeout cleanup from TASK-AAO-0164.
